CustomField.formula: IF( OR( AND( TEXT(SW_Fit_Score__c) = 'A', BI_Data__r.Intent_Score__c >= 4 ), AND( TEXT(SW_Fit_Score__c) = 'B', BI_Data__r.Intent_Score__c >= 7 ), AND( TEXT(SW_Fit_Score__c) = 'C', BI_Data__r.Intent_Score__c >= 7 ) ), 'Hard MQL', IF( OR( TEXT(SW_Fit_Score__c) = 'A', AND( TEXT(SW_Fit_Score__c) = 'B', BI_Data__r.Intent_Score__c >= 4 ), AND( TEXT(SW_Fit_Score__c) = 'D', BI_Data__r.Intent_Score__c >= 7 ) ), 'Soft MQL', IF( OR( TEXT(SW_Fit_Score__c) = 'B', TEXT(SW_Fit_Score__c) = 'C' ), 'Reserve', IF( OR( AND( TEXT(SW_Fit_Score__c) = 'E', BI_Data__r.Intent_Score__c >= 7 ) ), 'Unverified MQL', 'Nurture' ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: MQL Status
